title: asclepias decumbens
intro: Asclepias decumbens, also known as low milkweed or spreading milkweed, is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Asclepias decumbens include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of various infections, such as skin and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Asclepias decumbens can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
